# pfsense_package (Data Source)

Retrieves a single installed pfSense package by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_package" "example" {
  name = "pfSense-pkg-nmap"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Package name (e.g. 'pfSense-pkg-saml2-auth').

### Read-Only

- `installed_version` (String) Currently installed version of the package.
- `description` (String) Package description.
